RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court took PLAINTIFFs MICHAEL RIVAS and Catherine Rivas' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES under submission. (DAG/301/SL) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Feb-24-2003 Continued To Apr-01-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Henry H. Shain, Esq., 781-6500, for plaintiffs Michael and Catherine Rivas moving for attorney fees and expenses
Patricia Barlow, Esq., 977-1107, counsel specially appearing for defendant and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court C O N T I N U E D PLAINTIFFs MICHAEL and Catherine RIVAS' MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES to April 1, 2003. The Court further ordered the following briefing schedules: defendant's opening brief due on 3/12, plaintiff's opposition due 3/19, defendant's reply due 3/26. (DAG/301/SL-X) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
